title: GTA 6 reveals its official cover and opens pre-orders on June 25
summary: Rockstar announces the pre-order date and box art for Grand Theft Auto VI, generating great excitement among players.

title: Epic presents Unreal Engine 6 at State of Unreal 2026 with AI tools
summary: The new version of the engine will allow using Fortnite skins in other games and integrates generative artificial intelligence.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops II will receive ports for PS4 and PS5 in July
summary: Treyarch announces modern versions of classic Call of Duty games for PlayStation consoles.

title: Insomniac releases a new trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day and confirms a free suit for July
summary: The trailer shows Hulk and a mysterious Sadie Sink, while Spider-Man 2 will receive the 'Fresh Start Suit' inspired by the film.

title: OtherSide lays off 17 employees and cancels the immersive sim Argos: Riders on the Storm
summary: Warren Spector's studio splits from the project and reduces its workforce, affecting the creator of Deus Ex.

title: Rockstar loses legal battle: laid-off workers can take 'blacklist' allegations to trial
summary: A British labor court rules that union complaints against GTA 6 must be heard in the final trial.

title: Dispatch releases 'HR Violations' update that reduces censorship on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2
summary: The messaging game removes some of the original censorship through a free downloadable patch.

title: Gang of Dragon, the spiritual successor to Yakuza, appears to have been canceled after NetEase withdrew funding
summary: The studio of the creator of Yakuza faces uncertainty and the possible loss of its director.

title: Vampire Survivors reviews its collaboration with Fortnite after Epic's focus on generative AI
summary: Developer Poncle evaluates whether to continue the crossover due to recent controversies over artificial intelligence.

title: Pokémon Pokopia celebrates the 'Wish Upon a Jirachi' event with the mythical Pokémon
summary: Players will be able to obtain the legendary Jirachi during the limited-time event in Pokopia.

title: Street Fighter 6 launches Yasmine as new DLC character on August 3
summary: Capcom reveals the gameplay of the fighter, which will arrive along with new downloadable content options.

title: Shawn Layden, former PlayStation executive, criticizes Xbox's 'basic misunderstanding' of the industry
summary: The former PlayStation head states that Xbox's recent moves demonstrate a lack of understanding of the business.

title: Rockstar offers free GTA 5 update to PS5 and Xbox Series X|S for owners of previous version
summary: Owners of GTA 5 on PS4 and Xbox One can get the enhanced version for free for one week.

title: Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake generates expectations among fans
summary: Media highlights the opportunity to unite fans of Breath of the Wild and classics with the awaited remake.

title: Dave the Diver: In the Jungle receives guide coverage and reviews
summary: The DLC for the successful fishing game presents new content with recipes, fish, and items.

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok shown in a demo for Switch 2
summary: The action RPG expansion already has a demo available and positive first impressions.

title: Genshin Impact launches version Luna VIII 'Song of the Welkin Moon' on July 1
summary: The new update brings patch 6.7 with livestream codes and new summer content.

title: Warframe continues the story of Jade Shadows with the Constellations mission
summary: The new story chapter expands the Warframe universe with new mechanics and modes.

title: Bungie would lay off half of the studio while Project Blackbird is canceled
summary: Reports indicate that the Destiny developer suffers massive cuts and the cancellation of a promising project.

title: Epic launches Unreal Engine 5.8 with Lumen Lite optimized for Switch 2
summary: The graphics engine update includes improvements to terrain, vegetation, and a new more efficient global illumination mode.
